name: GAF_SyteLine_JrtSchsLoad_Tool_v1
description: Load job route schedule records (SLJrtSchs) to get _ItemId and current Setuprgid for routing operations

data.api_docs:
Method: GET
Endpoint: /load/SLJrtSchs
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Query Parameters:
Parameter: properties
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: Use exactly: Job,Suffix,OperNum,Setuprgid,SchedDrv,_ItemId
Parameter: filter
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: SQL WHERE clause. To load ALL operations for a job: Job = '     90001' AND Suffix = 0
To load a single operation: Job = '     90001' AND Suffix = 0 AND OperNum = 10
Parameter: orderby
Format: STRING
Required: False
Description: Use: OperNum ASC
Parameter: recordCap
Format: INTEGER
Required: False
Description: Max records. Omit to get all operations for the job.
CRITICAL: Job number must be left-padded with spaces to 10 chars (e.g., '     90001').
SLJrtSchs records are auto-created when routing operations are inserted via SLJobRoutes.
This tool loads records only. Use the SetuprgidUpdate tool to update Setuprgid and SchedDrv.
Batch-friendly: omit OperNum from filter to load ALL operations for a job in one call.
Extract _ItemId from EACH item in the response Items array — each operation has its own _ItemId.
Example Request:
Load all operations for job 90001:
GET /load/SLJrtSchs?properties=Job,Suffix,OperNum,Setuprgid,SchedDrv,_ItemId&filter=Job = '     90001' AND Suffix = 0&orderby=OperNum ASC
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object containing an Items array.
Key Response Fields:
- Items: Array of SLJrtSchs records (one per routing operation)
- For each record:
  - Job: Job number (left-padded to 10 chars)
  - Suffix: Job suffix (usually 0)
  - OperNum: Operation number (10, 20, 30...)
  - Setuprgid: Current setup resource group (null if not yet set)
  - SchedDrv: Current scheduling driver ('M' default, 'L' for labor)
  - _ItemId: Record identifier REQUIRED for the Update tool
If Items is empty: routing operations may not exist yet. Insert routing via SLJobRoutes first.
Each operation has a UNIQUE _ItemId — extract and pair with OperNum for the update step.
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Load SLJrtSchs records to get _ItemId for each routing operation.
Batch: filter by Job+Suffix (omit OperNum) to get ALL operations in one call.
Extract _ItemId per operation for use with SetuprgidUpdate tool.
Records auto-exist after routing insert.

SITE PARAMETER (REQUIRED):
- The <site> placeholder must be filled with the site value from the agent's input
- Format: [TENANT]_DALS (e.g., '<YOUR_SITE>')
